hooks.command: bash -c 'changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null); src_changed=$(echo "$changed" | grep -c "^src/" || true); if [ "$src_changed" -gt 0 ]; then fragment_count=$(ls changes/ 2>/dev/null | grep -cE "\.(feature|bugfix|doc|refactor|removal|misc)(\.(md))?$" || true); if [ "$fragment_count" -eq 0 ]; then echo "[dature checklist] src/ was modified but no changes/ fragment found — add one before finishing (towncrier)"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'src_changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^src/" || true); claude_changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^\.claude/" || true); if [ "$src_changed" -gt 0 ] && [ "$claude_changed" -eq 0 ]; then echo "[claude-docs] src/ was modified but .claude/ was not — did you introduce new patterns, conventions, or commands worth documenting in CLAUDE.md or commands/?" ; fi'
